name: Classic Cannoli - Cannoli Alla Siciliana
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, salt, olive oil, baking powder, 1 egg, and sugar. Mix well.
2. Gradually add enough wine to make a firm dough. Knead until smooth and elastic.
3. Roll the dough into very thin sheets and cut into 12 squares.
4. Place metal cannoli tubes diagonally onto each square so that the tube divides each square into two triangles. Lay the points of the triangles over the tubes so they meet in the middle. Seal gently by pressing.
5. Heat oil to a depth of 3-4 inches in a deep pan. Fry cannoli until golden brown, drain well on paper towels, and cool. Remove metal tubes.
6. In a bowl, combine the remaining egg yolk with ricotta cheese, orange flower water, candied orange (or citron), and chocolate. Blend well.
7. Fill cannoli with cheese mixture and sprinkle with confectioners' sugar.
